action.reasoning: Observation: Fine-tuned 3-layer DKT for 30 more epochs with LR 5e-5, reached val_auc 0.9999, model saved to best.pt and best_v2.pt. Analysis: Fine-tuning produced marginal improvement over previous 100-epoch model. Need to evaluate on test set to see if it increases AUC beyond 0.9998. Decision: submit eval with checkpoints/best.pt (fine-tuned) to update test score. If improvement, we can stop; if not, next iteration could accept current best.
